calendar.matters:
Petition For Approval Of Co-Trustee Resignation On Waiver Of Account; For Appointment Of Successor T
Off Calendar Jun-07-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Yulissa Zulaica for Wells Fargo Bank (Petitioner).
Kevin Rodriguez for the Beneficiaries.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with respect to why appointment of a Guardian Ad Litem to act on behalf of the Minors is not necessary, why an accounting is not necessary and why modification to the provisions should be allowed under changed circumstances stating that they noticed the children and the parents in care of, that the beneficiaries are receiving statements, that nomination requires that all adults nominate, that there is no conflict, that the parents are not beneficiaries of the Trust or co-trustees, that the decedent never anticipated not having Wells Fargo, that the family has been working with Wells Fargo for 70-years, that the family has negotiated with Wells Fargo to move the Trust over to JP Morgan, that Mr. Rodriguez has personally reviewed the bank statements, that the Trustees deal with the parents for the minors, that the decedent had no idea that the relationship of the children and Wells Fargo would deteriorate, that the parents are only receiving distribution for the children's educational needs, etc. The Petition for Resignation of Co-Trustee on Waiver of Account, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

payments.description: PETN AND OPP RE INTERNAL AFFAIRS OF 17200 TRUST
